base_context.description: The next run will be this leader/base config plus ONLY the JSON changes returned by the advisor.

expected_direction: reduce tail MAE without materially reducing net profit or trade count
expected_effect: Primary expected improvement is lower worst MAE or reduced charm_pin_pullback_long tail exposure while preserving run_029 trade count, net profit, and protected fast extended-VWAP winners. Tradeoff is small loss of profitable delayed high-extension recoveries if the widened veto envelope overlaps clean charm-pin scalps.
label: extended-vwap-tail-boundary-nudge
rationale: Use one surgical-veto family and one parameter only. The best base remains run_029/run_037/run_038/run_040 at $7149.6 net profit, 107 trades, 0.4% drawdown, and -513.4 worst MAE. Latest run_041 did not beat the leader, and broad entry or 1DTE tightening has repeatedly damaged net profit. The strongest actionable clue is the enabled extended-VWAP rejection near-miss: the worst 2026-06-26 charm_pin_pullback_long trade missed only max-vwap-distance by 0.44 points. Prior direct max-rsi-slope nudge hurt score, so this tests the narrower boundary tied to the single global worst tail rather than expanding RSI/pullback thresholds that would hit more protected winners.
strategy_plan_next_experiments: Charm Pin High-Extension Tail Box Holdout
Charm Wall Admission Geometry Reversion Study
